🚀 Unlock the Full Power of FigDex
Connect to FigDex Web and transform your workflow with cloud storage, team collaboration, and advanced search capabilities.
☁️ Cloud Storage - Access your indices anywhere
👥 Team Sharing - Collaborate seamlessly
🔍 Advanced Search - Find frames instantly
🏷️ Smart Tagging - Organize with tags
Join thousands of designers already using FigDex Web
Web Connection
Why connect to FigDex Web?
• Cloud Storage: Save your indices online
• Team Sharing: Collaborate with your team
• Advanced Search: Find frames by tags & content

Step 2: Enter your API Key
